title: Milwaukee Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Milwaukee with a Z-Score of -3.11. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a significant impact on daily life.
The cold snap is expected to last for several days, with heating demand increasing significantly.
The current humidity is 70% and wind speed is 14.5 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense.
